title: Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom
scenario: An order without lines is invalid. TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> can enforce that invariant at the wrapper boundary.
instructions: Implement TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> for OrderLines and return OrderLinesError::Empty when the vector has no lines.

hints.body: Keep the Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code active and implement TryFrom<Vec<OrderLine>> for OrderLines and return OrderLinesError::Empty when the vector has no lines.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom is shown below.

completionExplanation: Validate collection wrappers with TryFrom now extends the active Exposing iteration on collection wrappers code with wrap nonempty tryfrom. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
